name: Employer offered low settlement for neck injury, take it in Ogden?

mainEntity.name: Employer offered low settlement for neck injury, take it in Ogden?

acceptedAnswer.description: No, if undervalues permanency or future care; negotiate or litigate.[6] Key factors: (1) Get impairment rating first; (2) Compare averages $340k UT; (3) No lump sum without advice. Hold out. Better value possible.
